items.title: The 'F1 of athletics'? Athlos announces London debut
items.summary: The all-female track meet Athlos will be hosted in London for the first time later this year as it expands to two events.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Vote for your favourite moment from 52 years of Football Focus
items.summary: Vote for which Football Focus moment you want to be shown again in the programme's final episode on Sunday.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: TNT, Rain or Shine draw first blood in Commissione...
items.summary: TNT Tropang 5G and Rain or Shine Elasto Painters have both started the Commissioner's Cup semis with victories.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
